name: Accounts of Eibon, The Unfathomable (Coptic Version)

description.value:
A collection of scrolls, translations of an earlier text written by the ancient Hyperborean sorcerer Eibon. This version contains seventeen old scrolls giving detailed accounts of Formless Spawn and Serpent Men, as well as the Great Old Ones Abhoth, Atlach-Nacha, Rlim-Shaikorth, and especially Tsathoggua. This is the most complete and dangerous version of the three known versions.

LanguageCoptic
AuthorEibon (Hyperborean sorcerer, translator unknown)
